content.en:
Soon, the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Heavenly Sea Sect, the Mitian Sect, and the Supreme Dao Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple came.

Among them, Yan Ancestor, Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor, Heavenless Dao Ancestor, and Kunxing Dao Ancestor also arrived, and two hundred Supreme Dao Ancestors surrounded the Supreme Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain.

Yan Zu threatened in a cold voice: "Black Wind Mountain, Dark King, immediately stop refining the Forbidden Void Realm, we can not make a move on you, otherwise your Black Wind Mountain will fall a large number of Supreme Dao Ancestors this time!"

"Is it up to you?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Seeing that Ye Tian was still provoking Yan Ancestor and them, Nirvana Dao Ancestor hurriedly sent a message to persuade Ye Tian: "Dark King, even I am not Yan Zu's opponent, and this time it is Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor, Heavenless Dao Ancestor and Kunxing Dao Ancestor who are coming, if they go together, we can't stop it at all!"

Ye Tian looked at the Niekong Dao Ancestor and said, "Nirvana Dao Ancestor, do you know why the Black Wind Mountain handed over the position of team leader to me a dark king who has not long become the Ten Kings, because you absolutely trust me, and you don't seem to trust me all the time! Remember, my orders cannot be resisted! Since you don't believe me, then stay aside and don't get in my way!"

Nirvana Dao Ancestor was angry, but he couldn't argue with Ye Tian at this time.

Ye Tian's taunt made Yan Zu and the others angry, and they were not ready to stop.

The value of the medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm was too great, and they didn't want Black Wind Mountain to seize this Forbidden Void Realm.

Even if everyone belongs to an alliance, but if you enter this medium-sized forbidden void realm, then everyone is an enemy.

"Kill!"

Yan Zu ordered.

Bang!!!!

The strongest Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace slaughtered the Dao Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain one after another.

Then.

Ye Tian made a move!

I saw Ye Tian, holding the Town Boundary Monument in his left hand, continuing to refine the Forbidden Void Realm, holding the Dark Extreme Dao Spear in his right hand, and at an extremely fast speed, he clicked countless times towards the Void Instant.

Puff puff!!!

Countless spears slashed through the void in an instant, although such an attack was not as good as directly piercing the enemy with the Dark Pole Dao Spear, but it covered a large area and could target multiple Supreme Dao Ancestors at once.

I saw that many of the Heavenly Emperor Palace's supreme Dao Ancestors were pierced by the spear one by one, and even the supreme Dao Ancestors such as Yan Ancestor and Xuanhu Dao Ancestor were directly shocked and flew out.

Puff puff!!!

One of the strongest Dao Ancestors vomited blood and retreated, their expressions changed drastically, while the sixteen weaker Supreme Dao Ancestors were directly killed in seconds, and they didn't even have a chance to heal their injuries at all.

One person fought more than 100 Supreme Dao Ancestors alone, and shocked Yan Ancestor and Xuan Hu Dao Ancestor, and also killed sixteen Supreme Dao Ancestors.

Such combat effectiveness can be called invincible!

"The strongest Dao Ancestor who is comparable to the invincible Dao Ancestor's combat power has also mastered the Forbidden Dao Technique, I didn't expect you to hide so deeply in the Dark King!"

Yan Zu exclaimed.

"Do you really want to attack? Ordinary top supreme Dao Ancestors can't resist one of my moves, if I target any top supreme Dao Ancestor, he will die!

Ye Tian threatened.

Many Supreme Dao Ancestors were really frightened, if they were only seriously injured, they could still withdraw from the battlefield, so that they could survive and recover from their injuries.

But if it's killed in seconds, then there's nothing.

Naturally, they were afraid and did not dare to step forward.

"Go on!"

Yan Zu ordered.

However, the strongest Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace were also loosened.

A supreme Dao Ancestor said: "Yan Ancestor, we are not the opponents of the Dark King, even if we do, it will not be of much use!"

"Rubbish!"

Yan Zu said coldly.

But there is no way, these supreme Dao Ancestors are really not necessarily afraid of him, everyone has the support of the invincible Dao Ancestor level emperor behind them, and the background is not simple.

And his Yan Ancestor had no chance of entering the Invincible Dao Ancestor realm, so the others were just afraid of his combat power, but they didn't obey him.

"Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor, Heavenless Dao Ancestor, Kunxing Dao Ancestor, let's go up together and stop the Dark King!"

Yan Ancestor passed the message to the Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor and them, Dao.

The Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor replied, "Yan Ancestor, I can't mobilize other Supreme Dao Ancestors, they are also afraid. However, I can join forces with you against the Dark King!"

The Heavenless Dao Ancestor and the Kunxing Dao Ancestor also expressed their willingness to join forces, but the other Supreme Dao Ancestors would not make a move.

There was no way, the other Supreme Dao Ancestors didn't have the confidence to resist Ye Tian's forbidden Dao technique.

Whoa!!

Yan Ancestor, Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor, Heavenless Dao Ancestor, Kunxing Dao Ancestor, these five supreme Dao Ancestors walked over, and their breath locked on Ye Tian.

"Dark King, do you have the courage to join forces with the five of us? Except for the forbidden weapon, no other treasures are allowed, if you win, then the five of us will withdraw from fighting for the refining authority of the Forbidden Void Realm!"

Yan Zu said provocatively.

"Oh, yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

If you can defeat these five supreme Dao ancestors, you can avoid fighting, which is naturally a good thing.

He didn't want to kill too many Supreme Dao Ancestors, otherwise even if he really killed all of these Supreme Dao Ancestors, who would dare to guarantee that the Heavenly Emperor Palace would not send more Supreme Dao Ancestors?

After all, there are far more powerful Dao Ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace!

"Seal!"

Ye Tianshou evacuated the town boundary monument and temporarily stopped refining, and if he didn't refine for a short time, the impact was not very great.

At the same time, he asked the strongest Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain to protect the town boundary monument and prevent people from destroying its origin of suppressing the Forbidden Void Realm.

Above the Endless Void.

Ye Tian confronted the five supreme Dao Ancestors, and the Xuan Protector Dao Ancestor was at the forefront.

After all, Xuanhu Dao Ancestor is the best at defense, it can be called a defense that cannot be broken, and it can even hard-shake the defense of the invincible Dao Ancestor, and it is the most difficult to kill, so he naturally has to withstand Ye Tian's attack.

In the face of these five supreme Dao Ancestors, Ye Tian was also fully combat-powered.

Dacheng-level forbidden body!

Ancient Desolate Body, Nine Turns Immortal Golden Body......

Although the Great Thousand Dao Technique is not very useful, it is also useful, after all, he has not been a Supreme Dao Ancestor for a long time, and he has no time to create a Gate Supreme Dao Technique, so he can only use the Great Thousand Dao Technique, which is also one of his flaws, but it has little impact.

He also wanted to create a forbidden dao technique, but it would inevitably take a long time, so he hadn't created a second forbidden dao technique yet.

When Ye Tian showed out the forbidden weapon, Yan Zu and the others were stunned.

"Top Forbidden Weapon !!!"

Yan Zu and the others were incredulous, and even had a greedy color.

Top Forbidden Weapons, Invincible Dao Ancestors don't have such forbidden weapons, and at present, only half-step domain ancestors have top-level forbidden weapons, and Ye Tian, a supreme Dao Ancestor, actually holds a top-level forbidden weapon.

Moreover, this is still a very unfamiliar top-level forbidden weapon, not a forbidden weapon lent to Ye Tian by the half-step domain ancestors.

So—

"If I take this top-level forbidden weapon, it will belong to me!" Yan Zu thought to himself.

Moreover, if he traded such a top-level forbidden weapon with the half-step domain ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, he might be able to trade to make up for his own injuries, so as to seek a chance to break through to become an invincible Dao Ancestor.

Similarly, the other four Supreme Dao Ancestors also had the idea of capturing the top-level forbidden weapon.

After all, the value of top-of-the-line forbidden weapons is too high!
